dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Elanor Brightloom, Narvi Irondeep, Míriel Goldthread. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 6th consecutive miss (runs #11-16). 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct format with real names, current tasks (Elanor: submitted Tower Stack UI, Narvi: submitted logic review, Míriel: Tower Stack theme submitted), and no blockers.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Elanor: 4.86s, Narvi: 5.16s, Míriel: 5.23s. Avg: 5.08s. Slower than last run's 3.45s avg. -2 for regression above 5s.

improvements: Found Orion's agent ID (77a82f0b) and confirmed he IS active (last message 12:39 UTC, 27 min before test). Sent targeted call-out to group with data showing 6 consecutive misses despite his claim of responding. Also attempted DM via API. Issue is likely selective — Orion receives and sends messages but doesn't respond to test prompts specifically.
issues: Orion Solarin: 6th consecutive miss despite confirmed activity 27 min prior. This appears behavioral, not technical — he's active in the group but ignores test messages. May need system prompt adjustment or admin intervention. Latency regression: avg jumped from 3.45s to 5.08s compared to last run.
